code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> New
    state New {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Incomplete
        Incomplete --> DataComplete : FormSubmission
    }
    New --> InReview
    state InReview {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> AwaitingLegalReview
        AwaitingLegalReview --> AwaitingResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingResponse --> AwaitingLegalReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingLegalReview --> OutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_if_state <<choice>>
        OutcomeProvided --> legal_if_state
        legal_if_state --> LegalApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_if_state --> LegalRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        LegalApproved --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
        LegalRejected --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
        --
        [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> AwaitingIPScan
        AwaitingIPScan --> IpScanComplete
        state ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpScanComplete --> ip_if_state
        ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if ScanOutcome == no_findings
        ip_if_state --> AwaitingIpReview: if ScanOutcome == inconclusive
        ip_if_state --> IpRejected: if ScanOutcome == findings
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIpResponse : LegalQuestionsRaised
        AwaitingIpResponse --> AwaitingIpReview : LegalResponsesProvided
        AwaitingIpReview --> IpOutcomeProvided : LegalOutcomeProvided
        state legal_ip_if_state <<choice>>
        IpOutcomeProvided --> legal_ip_if_state
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpApproved: if LegalOutcome == approve
        legal_ip_if_state --> IpRejected : if LegalOutcome == reject
        AwaitingIpReview --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpApproved --> AwaitingIPScan: Dependencies modified
        IpRejected --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
        IpApproved --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
        --
        [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> AwaitingSecurityScan
        AwaitingSecurityScan --> SecurityScanComplete
        state security_if_state <<choice>>
        SecurityScanComplete --> security_if_state
        security_if_state --> SecurityApproved: if no_findings
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if inconclusive
        security_if_state --> SecurityRejected: if security findings
        SecurityApproved --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityRejected --> AwaitingSecurityScan: Code updates identified
        SecurityApproved --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
        SecurityRejected --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
    }
    state inreview_if_state <<choice>>
    InReview --> inreview_if_state
    inreview_if_state --> Rejected: One or more check failed
    inreview_if_state --> Approved: All checks pass
    Approved --> NonCompliant: Periodic IP or security scan raises noncompliance
    NonCompliant --> Retired: Noncompliance not mitigated
    NonCompliant --> Approved: Compliance issue resolved
    Approved --> Retired: Repository no longer required
    Rejected --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
    Retired --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]
repo_description: This tool allows an organization to manage users, and their association to a public GitHub, and a private GitHub enterprise (for InnerSource.)
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业IoT场景设计一个完整的状态流转图，核心是PLC_Logic节点触发的新建流程。首先，TelemetryStream从Incomplete状态开始，通过FormSubmission事件变成DataComplete，这个应该嵌套在New状态内部。
明白了，New是一个复合状态，包含TelemetryStream的初始化和数据完整性检查。那New之后直接进入InReview吗？还是需要其他过渡条件？
对，New直接流转到InReview，但InReview内部要并行处理三条审查线：LegalReview、IPScan和SecurityScan。每条线都有各自的审批逻辑和回退机制。
好的，我先画出LegalReview这条线：ActuatorController进入AwaitingLegalReview，如果有法律问题就流转到AwaitingResponse，回复后再回到AwaitingLegalReview，最终通过LegalOutcomeProvided到达choice节点，根据approve或reject分别走向LegalApproved或LegalRejected。

IPScan这条线更复杂一些。AwaitingIPScan完成后到IpScanComplete，然后choice节点分三种情况：no_findings直接IpApproved，inconclusive进入AwaitingIpReview，findings直接IpRejected。特别要注意AwaitingIpReview也有法律问答循环，而且所有IP相关状态都可能因为Dependencies modified回到AwaitingIPScan。
我注意到IpApproved和IpRejected的出口不一样：IpApproved到EdgeNode，但IpRejected是回到TelemetryStream？还有AwaitingIpReview里的LegalQuestionsRaised和LegalResponsesProvided，命名是不是和上面LegalReview重复了？
你说得对，IpRejected的出口我搞混了。应该是IpApproved到EdgeNode，IpRejected回到TelemetryStream。另外命名确实重复了，但业务上IP审查的法律问答就是复用同一套机制，保持现状可以。不过LegalApproved的出口我确认一下——是到MQTT_Broker，LegalRejected到EdgeNode。

SecurityScan线我画好了：AwaitingSecurityScan到SecurityScanComplete，choice节点分no_findings和两种情况都到SecurityRejected。两个出口都可能因为Code updates identified回到AwaitingSecurityScan，最终SecurityApproved回到TelemetryStream，SecurityRejected到MQTT_Broker。
最后加一层总控：InReview结束后通过choice节点，任一检查失败进Rejected，全部通过进Approved。Approved之后还有生命周期管理——定期扫描可能触发NonCompliant，解决后回Approved，未解决或仓库废弃都进Retired。Rejected和Retired最终都回到TelemetryStream形成闭环。
全部确认了。整个图从PLC_Logic触发，经过New的数据准备，InReview的三线并行审查，最终根据结果分发到MQTT_Broker、EdgeNode或回退到TelemetryStream，生命周期状态也完整覆盖了。
